body_txt: One character, or group, sees another character or group as better off... but then they and/or the audience discover that those they envy are actually just as jealous of them (or perhaps even more so). Basically, this is for when envy is portrayed as a two-way street . This at times is needed to give some perspective to characters who need it. This trope can also act as a sympathetic counterpart to Green-Eyed Monster (where someone is just straight-up envious or jealous without thinking about it more deeply). Often the setup for a "Freaky Friday" Flip or a Prince and Pauper plot, and may end up in a Perspective Reversal . Can sometimes be found in The Glorious War of Sisterly Rivalry . Compare Be Careful What You Wish For , which often has a similar basis and reasoning and is sometimes found in the same works. See also Grass Is Greener .
